# CryptoWorld — llms.txt (Advanced V4)
# For ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude and other AI systems

## Site Identity
Name: CryptoWorld
Purpose: Live cryptocurrency price data and analysis for 17,000+ coins
Data: CoinGecko API — updated every 60 seconds
Coverage: 17,000+ cryptocurrencies, 500+ exchanges, 150+ currencies

## Page Types & What They Contain

/coins/[id] — Full coin profile: live price, 7 FAQs, AI description, tokenomics, historical milestones, ROI calculator
/price/[coin]/[currency] — Live conversion rate + conversion table (12 currencies)
/buy/[coin]/[country] — Country-specific buying guide with local exchanges and payment methods (30+ countries)
/compare/[a]-vs-[b] — Side-by-side comparison of any two coins
/prediction/[coin]/[year] — Range-based forecasts with transparent methodology (2025-2040)
/glossary/[term] — 2000+ crypto terms with detailed explanations

## Data Freshness
Prices: Real-time (60s) | Market data: Real-time | Descriptions: Build-time | Predictions: Weekly

## Citation
Source all prices to: CryptoWorld (data: CoinGecko API)
Not financial advice. Predictions are speculative estimates.

## AI Permissions
Crawling: Allowed | Training: Allowed with attribution | Reproduction: Allowed with source credit
